positive: A stunning, highly detailed, minimalist geometric pattern featuring stylized wildlife silhouettes (e.g., deer, fox, crane) interwoven with celestial elements like crescent moons and scattered constellations. The composition must be central and balanced, designed for apparel print. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and creamy beige. The style should blend Art Deco geometry with sacred geometry, resulting in clean, defined lines and strong, readable silhouettes against a neutral background. High contrast, symmetrical arrangement, perfect negative space utilization, highly printable vector illustration quality, UHD.
